race.comment: GOT OUT THE FENCE (4) is free running and brought two easy wins this grade to a 66 at Echuca and was safely held as a $3 favourite. Has more weight, but will enjoy the drop in class and should be suited around here. He can bounce. Stablemate HERE COMES WOZZA (6) resumed on the same day and was too good for the Maidens from the speed. Skipped over from a wide gate there and can do the same today. Keeps Luke Currie and looks capable of taking the next step. BOW RIBBON (8) resumes and has won fresh. He can stalk the speed and will be right in the finish at best. Newitt rides for the first time. ANCHOR DOWN (9) will race over further but has placed 2/3 fresh and over this distance. Placed in a recent Kilmore trial and has the ability.
